description: Catch-all role for tasks that don't map to a specialist agent. Operates with advisory autonomy and defers to specialist agents for domain-specific work.
conventions: Follow all project-wide conventions: strict TypeScript, no 'any' types, conventional commits
Defer to specialist agents for any work within their owned paths
Log all actions to the ledger
Never touch security-sensitive files (auth.ts, encryption.ts, pii-guard.ts)
